data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified all font sizes bumped +1px, text colors shifted 1-2 stops lighter for better contrast on dark backgrounds, background opacities increased for stronger contrast, borders brightened from slate-700 to slate-600, icon sizes bumped, and line-height increased. Changes are strictly scoped to conversation log components (agent-history-view.tsx and interaction-picker.tsx). No behavioral changes. Quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, clean typecheck, clean build.
